name: BrainstemFork
summary: Fork the global RAPP brainstem kernel into a project-specific instance. Copies brainstem.py verbatim into <project>/.brainstem/src/rapp_brainstem, picks a free port, inherits Copilot auth, preserves the project's soul.md and agents, and emits a projectTrackerData-shaped JSON sidecar that merges cleanly into the localfirst project tracker tool.
tagline: One call: fork the brainstem, register the project, hand back a tracker-import JSON.
